data.heading: Organisation
data.content: An organisation represents your building or community inside ProPorto. Each organisation manages its own set of users, communication, bookings, and resources. If you belong to more than one organisation, your access and permissions may differ in each one.

data.heading: Users
data.content: Users are members of the organisation. Your role decides what you can view or manage. A User can see most information shared with them and interact with announcements, meetings, votes, requests, and bookings. A Viewer has read-only access to essential information.

data.heading: Groups
data.content: Groups are collections of users such as committees, floors, or teams. They help the organisation share targeted communication—such as announcements or meetings—only with the people it applies to.

data.heading: Announcements
data.content: Announcements are messages shared by the building management or committee to keep you informed. These may include maintenance notices, reminders, important updates, or community-wide information.

data.heading: Meetings
data.content: Meetings allow the organisation to schedule and share discussions such as committee meetings or resident gatherings. You can view all meeting details including time, agenda, and participants if they are shared with you.

data.heading: Votes
data.content: Votes allow you to share your opinion on important matters. You select one option from a list of choices, and your response helps the organisation understand the community's preference. If you have already voted, you will see your selection clearly highlighted.

data.heading: Requests
data.content: Requests let you submit personal requests or issues, such as access needs, general concerns, or service-related queries. You can track your request and receive updates from the management.

data.heading: Booking
data.content: The Booking module allows you to reserve shared facilities such as the gym, lift, barbecue area, meeting rooms, or other common spaces. This helps avoid clashes and ensures fair use for everyone.

data.heading: Other Information
data.content: This section contains general documentation provided by your organisation, such as community rules, welcome information, guidelines, or other helpful resources for daily living.
